title: Cryptool moves from test server to mainnet this week
content_html:
Cryptool is making the move from the test server to mainnet this week.

Before flipping the switch, the team is running one final round of pressure-testing on the Raise module. Anyone who wants to help can sign up on the test platform and run a small pool deposit with test tokens. Every test deposit helps confirm the system is ready for real traffic at scale.

All testers from this round, and from every earlier test round, will be rewarded for their time. The full step-by-step is in the testnet documentation on the Cryptool site.
author: Cryptool
